Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Remember how I told you I wanted to improve my cooking?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}Well, I've been trying a lot since then, but I can never seem to get the taste right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I still don't have a feel for how much salt to add. How do you do it, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 13 3 15 6}Oh, so speed is important? That makes a lot of sense, actually.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I've just been pouring it in slowly. I'll try and remember that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I don't think I'm on that level yet, but I bet it helps bring out the natural flavors of the ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Hehe. I'd like to eat your cooking someday, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}...But you know, I feel like that could end up being really tasty. Maybe I'll give it a try next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I was actually hoping I could make something you'd really like, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But I don't think I'll be able to do that for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Maybe cooking just isn't for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}O-Oh, sorry. I know you're just trying to help me, and all I'm doing is being negative.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}That really means a lot to me. I've never had someone be so supportive of me like this before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'm never going to get better with that kind of attitude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}And they do say that failure is the mother of success. I'll keep working at it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I have only just started. I can't let this keep me down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Maybe I should try taking notes. That might help me figure out what I'm doing wrong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I actually have quite a lot of trouble staying optimistic about things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}In my head, I always imagine something going horribly wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}That's why sometimes I feel like giving up when I'm cooking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}When I'm around you, or the rest of the team, I never think like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}You've all given me so much confidence in myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}So, I'm really thankful to be a member of SEES.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}That's why I want to show you all my gratitude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka is starting to trust me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Maybe I should watch one of those cooking shows on TV.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Actually... they might be a little too advanced for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}The library might have some books for beginners though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Hmm... But in that case, I can't really read while cooking. I wouldn't want to get the pages dirty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Oh, right. I guess I could do that, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I don't really like going to bookstores.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}If we're looking for books, that means we'd need to go to the bookstore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}It's not a big deal or anything, but... I don't really like going to bookstores.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Oh my gosh, when did it get so late!? I have to go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Um, the hair dryer burned out, so I was planning on fixing it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}But I was hoping to get it done before Yukari-chan and the others got back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Sorry, do you mind if we up the pace on the way back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hurried back to the dorm with Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}
